items.title: Judge dismisses criminal case against Kilmar Abrego Garcia
items.summary: A federal judge says the Maryland man who was wrongfully deported last year is being prosecuted for political reasons.

items.title: Police Deputy Praised After ‘Run-of-the-Mill’ Call Turns into Emergency Baby Delivery
items.summary: A call about suspicious activity saw a California police officer race to save a newborn’s life. A woman was sitting between two bushes near a business in the Rancho Cordova, and Deputy Foster Tracy de…
